name: Raspberry Mojito
title: Raspberry Mojito Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Raspberry Mojito | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A fruity mojito made with BACARDÍ Raspberry rum, mint, lime, raspberries, sugar, and club soda.
marketing_description: A raspberry twist on the classic mojito for a kick of fruity flavour.

steps: Build all ingredients in a highball glass and lightly muddle.
Top with club soda and stir lightly before serving.
Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint and a raspberry.

garnish: A sprig of fresh mint and a raspberry
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Raspberry Mojito 50 ml BACARDÍ Raspberry rum 3 raspberries 4 lime wedges 2 tsp sugar 12 mint leaves top with club soda Raspberry Mojito Recipe One step at a time 1 Build Build all ingredients in a highball glass and lightly muddle. 2 Stir Add crushed ice and stir. 3 Top Top with club soda and stir lightly before serving. 4 Garnish Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint and a raspberry.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Raspberry Mojito Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
